response.justification: Bogdan possesses an outstanding technical background with over 15 years of experience, including Staff and Senior roles at top-tier companies like Stripe and Shopify. While he perfectly matches the technical stack and all nice-to-have requirements (AWS, Kubernetes, LLMs), he is drastically overqualified for this junior/mid-level entry role. This severe seniority mismatch would almost certainly result in misaligned compensation expectations and job dissatisfaction.
strengths: Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and REST APIs.
Meets all nice-to-have qualifications including AWS, Kubernetes, and LLMs.
Proven track record in clean software architecture and system design.
concerns: Massively overqualified for an entry-level or junior position.
High likelihood of salary expectations far exceeding the role's budget.
May find the limited scope of an entry-level role unchallenging.
